notes: App icon + dark theme-matched title bar; flat branded combo boxes; reorganized Quality Control menu (COAs + Microbiological COAs submenu); document generation runs off the UI thread with a progress indicator and pre-warmed LibreOffice; FP739-1 and Item/Microbiological CoA generation ported to the real templates (incl. the internal-CoA signature step); smoother LibreOffice install. Self-contained x64.
